label: Alien planet sky — 3 orbiting light sources with independent rays + Snell rims
notes: Single central light source replaced with 3 sources orbiting at different radii and speeds (0.08/0.06/0.04 rad/s), phases offset by 2π/3. Each source has: own FBM-warped rotating god rays (5 spokes, different rotation direction B reverses), own breathing Snell rim at independent phase. Interference zones between sources create complex crossing light patterns. Combined intensity scaled by 0.52 to match single-source brightness. All sources confined to Act 2 palette (no warm tones).

operations.note: Full rewrite — lightSource() function handles one source, called 3x with different orbit params. Sources orbit elliptically: A(0.22x0.18), B(0.28x0.20), C(0.18x0.24).
operations.before: single rotating FBM-warped god rays (5 spokes) + breathing Snell window, static center
